product_brief: AI-powered, secure, and easy to use email trusted by billions of people and businesses.
pqc_capability_description: Not stated. The document mentions "enterprise-grade security," "security-by-design cloud infrastructure," and blocking spam/phishing/malware, but contains no explicit mention of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC), quantum-resistant algorithms, or PQC migration plans.
architecture_type: Cloud-based SaaS (Google's secure, resilient global infrastructure)
primary_platforms: Computer, phone, watch, tablet; Cloud (Google Workspace)
target_industries: Financial Services, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Retail, Manufacturing, Government and Public Sector, Professional Services, Technology, Education, Nonprofits
